title: Hostpath Provisioner Helm Chart Values
description: Configuration values for the Hostpath Provisioner Helm chart.

global.title: Global Configuration
global.description: Global settings shared across all subcharts. Additional properties are allowed so parent umbrella charts can pass arbitrary global values through Helm.

imageRegistry.title: Image Registry
imageRegistry.description: Global container image registry override. When set, all images will be pulled from this registry.

imagePullSecrets.title: Image Pull Secrets
imagePullSecrets.description: Global list of image pull secrets for authenticating to private registries.

nodeSelector.title: Node Selector
nodeSelector.description: Global node selector applied to all pods.

tolerations.title: Tolerations
tolerations.description: Global tolerations applied to all pods.

kubevirtNamespace.title: KubeVirt Namespace
kubevirtNamespace.description: Global KubeVirt namespace. Used by subcharts that deploy into the KubeVirt namespace.

namespace.title: Namespace
namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace where hostpath-provisioner components will be deployed.

storagePath.title: Storage Path
storagePath.description: Host filesystem path used for provisioning persistent volumes. WARNING: Use a dedicated partition, NOT a directory on the OS disk.

storagePools.title: Storage Pools
storagePools.description: List of additional storage pool definitions for the hostpath provisioner.

operator.title: Operator Configuration
operator.description: Configuration for the hostpath-provisioner operator deployment.

image.title: Image
image.description: Container image settings for the hostpath-provisioner operator.

repository.title: Repository
repository.description: Container image repository for the hostpath-provisioner operator.

nodeSelector.title: Node Selector
nodeSelector.description: Node selector for scheduling the hostpath-provisioner operator pods.

tolerations.title: Tolerations
tolerations.description: Tolerations for the hostpath-provisioner operator pods.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this component is enabled. Controlled by the parent chart.
